tool_args.label: Board authorization for BOS RFP - March 29, 2023
tool_args.raw_text: On March 29, 2023, the Board adopted a resolution authorizing the use of the competitive Request for Proposals ("RFP") in lieu of competitive bidding to award a contract for the purchase, installation, and maintenance of four BOS systems.

payload.description: Board resolution authorizing competitive RFP for four Bus Operator Simulator systems

tool_args.label: BOS Project implemented by DOB
tool_args.raw_text: approve the award of a contract for the purchase, installation, and maintenance of four Bus Operator Simulator ("BOS") systems to Etech Simulation Corp. ("Etech"). The base award will be for a term of six years in the total estimated amount of $1,205,600.

payload.description: BOS simulator procurement for NYC Transit Department of Buses

tool_args.label: BOS Project has_partner MTABC
tool_args.raw_text: pursuant to Public Authorities Law, Section 1209, subdivision 9(g) for NYC Transit, Department of Buses ("DOB") and Section 1265-a, subdivision 4(g) for MTA Bus Company ("MTABC")

payload.description: BOS systems procurement serves both DOB and MTA Bus Company

payload.description: CNG fueling O&M contract for NYC Transit Department of Buses

tool_args.label: Pricing for Option Years Determined Fair and Reasonable

payload.claim_text: The pricing for these option years has been found to be fair and reasonable.
payload.description: Trillium CNG option year pricing validated by MTA's CNG consultant as fair and reasonable due to uniqueness of facilities and competitive pricing
payload.subject: Trillium CNG Option Year Pricing

tool_args.label: Etech selected as Best Overall Value

payload.claim_text: Etech provided the best overall value for the Authority as it received the highest technical scores from the SC and was the least expensive.
payload.description: Selection Committee unanimously recommended Etech for award based on best overall value
payload.subject: Etech Simulation Corp BOS Contract Award

payload.claim_text: Trillium has consistently performed satisfactorily, meeting or exceeding performance standards established by the MTA.
payload.description: Contractor performance meets or exceeds MTA standards
payload.subject: Trillium CNG

tool_args.label: CNG Fast-Fill Fueling Facilities at Four Depots
tool_args.raw_text: DOB and MTABC currently operate four compressed natural gas ("CNG") fast-fill fueling facilities at depots that support CNG buses: Jackie Gleason and West Farms are operated by DOB, and College Point and Spring Creek are operated by MTABC.

payload.description: Four compressed natural gas fast-fill fueling facilities at depots supporting CNG buses
payload.location_text: Jackie Gleason and West Farms operated by DOB; College Point and Spring Creek operated by MTABC

normalized_location.raw_text: Jackie Gleason and West Farms operated by DOB; College Point and Spring Creek operated by MTABC

tool_args.label: Bus Operator Simulator System Installation Locations
tool_args.raw_text: There will be three BOS systems installed at the Zerega Training Central Maintenance Facility, and one BOS system installed at the Spring Creek bus depot.

payload.claim_text: This contract will be funded with 100 percent MTA funds. Funding for the purchase of BOS systems has been approved in the MTA 2015–2025 Capital Program.

payload.raw_value_text: Twenty firms requested the RFP package, of which five submitted proposals: Etech, Virage Simulation, Inc, Excel Driver Service, LLC d/b/a Sim-Tech, FAAC, Inc., and DrivePro Simulation.
